ETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 303, JUDGE: DOUGLAS C. MUNSON; CLERK: DAVID SWANSON; REPORTER: MARY HINDS #2011. JOSEPH SCHIEFFER APPEARED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF AND MRIO RODRIGUEZ APPEARED IN PRO PER. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. $5274.10 JUDGMENT STAYED TO 3/27/02 AT 5PM. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: Mary Hinds #2011. Joseph Schieffer appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and Mrio Rodriguez appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held. Case settled on the record. $5274.10 judgment stayed to 3/27/02 at 5pm. Plaintiff waived attorney fees and costs. 3/18/02 trial date vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court adopted the tentative ruling as the order of the court: E. Mario Rodriquez's demurrer overruled violation of ccp 1005. Ten days leave to answer. (KH)Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter Judy Thomsen, CSR 5591
